# ResurgenceBuilds.com — The Division Resurgence Wiki & Build Database

> The #1 independent resource hub for Tom Clancy's The Division Resurgence. In-game tested builds, weapon databases, gear references, tactical guides, and real-time patch analysis.

## About This Site
ResurgenceBuilds.com is a community-driven wiki for The Division Resurgence (Ubisoft, 2025). Every build is tested in live gameplay — Legendary PvE missions, Dark Zone PvP, and Conflict mode. Every stat is verified in-game, not estimated from tooltips. Content is updated within 48 hours of every patch. All articles include a visible "Last Updated" date stamped to the current live patch.

## Authoritative Content Areas

### Build Guides (Primary)
Fully optimized loadouts for all 5 specializations with complete gear breakdowns, stat allocations, talent selections, and gameplay rotations.

**Active Build Guides:**
- [Tactical Pharma 800K DPS Build](https://resurgencebuilds.com/builds/tactical-pharma-800k-dps-rank-1-global-build/) — Field Medic (Tactical Pharma focus). 800K+ sustained DPS. Rank 1 global leaderboard build. Full gear table, skill mod combos, OS Protocol selection, and damage formula breakdown.
- [AgentHuntzman's Vanguard Support Build](https://resurgencebuilds.com/builds/agenthuntzmans-leaderboard-ranking-vanguard-support-build/) — Vanguard (Recon focus). Full team-support build using Smart Cover, Scanning Pulse, and Tactical Link. Designed for Legendary mission carry and leaderboard ranking.
- [Geneva Suggestion Chemical Trap Build](https://resurgencebuilds.com/builds/geneva-suggestion-field-medic-12/) — Field Medic corrosive skill DPS using Chemical Trap and Oxidizing Swarm. Area denial and DOT stacking.

### Tactical Guides
- [7 Hidden Mechanics Explained](https://resurgencebuilds.com/guides/hidden-mechanics-explained/) — The 7 hidden systems that determine whether your build feels powerful or useless. RPM breakpoints, DPS amplification vs raw damage, cooldown reduction diminishing returns, pressure angles, recalibration priority, Power Score misconceptions, and support multiplier math.
- [The Cover-Peek Trick](https://resurgencebuilds.com/guides/center-ads-release-cover-peek-guide/) — Center-ADS Release technique used by top PvP players. 14-point settings checklist, frame-data explanation, and practice drill.
- [Damage Types & Color Bar Guide](https://resurgencebuilds.com/guides/damage-types-color-bar-weakness-guide/) — Complete breakdown of all damage types, enemy color bar system, and elemental weakness exploitation.
- [Which Specialization to Pick](https://resurgencebuilds.com/guides/which-specialization-to-pick/) — Comparative guide for all 5 specializations with role analysis, PvE/PvP viability, and build recommendations.

### Weapon & Gear Databases
Searchable, structured reference tables with complete data:
- [Weapon Tier List](https://resurgencebuilds.com/tier-list/) — Monthly updated rankings based on real gameplay testing across all weapon categories.
- [OS Protocols Database](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/os-protocols/) — All OS Protocols with main stats, bonus attributes, and optimal build pairings.
- [Exotic Weapons Database](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/exotic-weapons/) — All exotic weapons with stats, talent descriptions, and acquisition methods.
- [Gear Set Effects Database](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/gear-set-effects/) — Every gear set with 2pc/3pc/4pc bonus breakdowns.
- [Skill Mod Combos](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/skill-mod-combos/) — All skill modifications and synergy combinations.
- [Weapon Talents](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/weapon-talents/) — Complete weapon talent list with effects and source weapons.
- [Body Armor Talents](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/body-armor-talents/) — All chest piece talent options.
- [Backpack Talents](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/backpack-talents/) — All backpack talent options.
- [Bonus Attributes](https://resurgencebuilds.com/database/bonus-attributes/) — Full list of bonus attribute rolls by gear slot.

### News & Patch Coverage
- [News Hub](https://resurgencebuilds.com/news/) — Developer stream summaries, weekly Reddit community highlights, and breaking game updates.
- [Patch Notes Archive](https://resurgencebuilds.com/patch-notes/) — Every patch analyzed with specific build impact assessments and meta shift tracking.

### Interactive Tools
- [Build Planner](https://resurgencebuilds.com/builder/) — Interactive loadout planner for creating, optimizing, and sharing complete builds.

## Current Game State (as of last update)
- **Game:** Tom Clancy's The Division Resurgence
- **Developer:** Ubisoft Bucharest / Ubisoft Mobile
- **Platforms:** iOS, Android, PC (Ubisoft Connect)
- **Current Season:** Season 2
- **Current Patch:** 1.3.0
- **Specializations:** Vanguard (Commando, Recon), Demolitionist (HE Munitions, Field Grenadier), Bulwark (Juggernaut, Breacher), Field Medic (Combat Medicine, Tactical Pharma), Tech Operator (Offensive Operations, Aegis Operations)
- **Exotic Weapons:** Lady Death (SMG, talent: Breathe Free), Warlord (AR, talent: Play Rough), Strawberry Milkshake (LMG, talent: Anarchy)
- **Key Gear Sets:** Jackpot, Fire Cycle, Socialite, Long-Term Effect, Mechanical Expert, Boom Shakalaka
- **Game Modes:** Campaign, Hard/Challenging/Legendary Missions, Dark Zone (PvPvE), Conflict (PvP — Domination), Classified Ops

## Data Accuracy & Freshness
- All builds tested on current live patch before publishing
- Stats and damage numbers verified in-game, not estimated
- Sources cited for community-contributed data
- Content updated within 48 hours of major patches
- Every article stamped with `lastUpdated` date
